name: HW Test
long_description: Single-screen PASS/WARN/FAIL hardware self-test for the Fri3d Camp 2026 badge: display, IO expander, touch, NeoPixels, battery, IMU, buttons (A/B/X/Y + START), joystick, microSD, LoRa (SX1262), audio and IR. Shows a short startup splash, then the test grid. Hold A/B/X/Y/S, move the stick, tap the screen, point an IR remote, insert/remove SD.
